name: hoakbot
description: Hoak Bot — A modular Discord bot for the Hoak Family community

scripts.build: tsc -b --force packages/plugin-contracts packages/plugin-sdk packages/example-plugin && tsc && npm run generate:assets && npm run dashboard:build
scripts.plugin-sdk:build: npm run build --workspace @hoakbot/plugin-contracts && npm run build --workspace @hoakbot/plugin-sdk
scripts.plugin-sdk:typecheck: npm run build --workspace @hoakbot/plugin-contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @hoakbot/plugin-sdk
scripts.plugin-sdk:test: npm run plugin-sdk:build && npm run build --workspace @hoakbot/example-plugin && tsc && node --test tests/plugin-sdk/*.test.js
scripts.plugin-sdk:check: npm run plugin-sdk:typecheck && npm run plugin-sdk:test && npm run plugin-sdk:api:check
scripts.lint: eslint src/ dashboard/ packages/*/src/**/*.ts packages/example-plugin/test/ scripts/ tests/
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --force packages/plugin-contracts packages/plugin-sdk packages/example-plugin && npm run check:commands && npm run check:events && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p dashboard/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run dashboard:test
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --coverage && vitest run --config dashboard/vite.config.ts --coverage && tsx scripts/check-phase-09-evidence.ts

author: Erastus HS
